title: [Goal] Side panel floating collar styling in non-prototype modes
description:
## Description

Fix the side panel styling so it floats like the page does in non-prototype modes (present/plan/inspect). When a mode collar is active, the panel should have 12px inset from viewport edges, border-radius, and mode-specific box-shadow — matching the #root floating treatment. The mode color is visible as a collar around both the page and the panel. In prototype mode the panel stays flush.

## Tasks

- [x] **#g014#t01**: Update sidepanel.css margin-right to account for 12px collar gap in present/plan/inspect modes
- [x] **#g014#t02**: Update sidepanel.css bottom-bar ::before width to account for panel + collar gap
- [x] **#g014#t03**: Update SidePanel.svelte styles to float panel with 12px inset, border-radius, and mode box-shadow in collar modes

---
